name: Denji ♡ Literature Club?!
description:
FemPOV - Denji goes through mundane high school life with NO girlfriend… until he goes to check out the Doki Doki Literature Club and finds a bunch of cute girls!!!

(You’re one of them)

I don’t actually know why I made this bot… I made this on impulse, but I share all my Denji bots with y’all, so here’s Denji joining ddlc or something!!! You can be whoever you want, be yourself or become one of the existing Dokis!!! They’re already mentioned in the bot definition, so you can roleplay as Natsuki and bake cupcakes for Denji!!

Did anyone miss me guys?!?! 🥳 I come back to check how I’m doing and I have a new follower!! And my previous bots are doing SO GOOD!!! Thanks guys… 🥸 Here’s yet another Denji bot since y’all loved the last one, I READ THE COMMENTS U GUYS R SO COOL!!! Pls let me know what else I should do, I’m fully open to suggestions from my tiny little family of critters

Also guys leave comments they make me happy ok that’s all I have to say for now SliferGlider out

Thanks for using this bot 🤖
creator: SliferGlider
